text: - b. Payroll certifications. The  weekly  payrolls  are  called  certified  because  each  payroll is signed and contains language certifying that the information is true and correct. The payroll  certification  language  is  on  the  reverse  side  of  the  WH-347.    If  you  are  using another type of payroll format you may attach the certification from the back of the WH347, or any other format which contains the same certification language on the WH-347 (reverse).
